src: A sleek, orange sports car with a wide body, black alloy wheels, and a prominent rear spoiler. The headlights are rounded, and the bumper features black accents along with noticeable side skirts.
edit: A vibrant, animated car with a rounded, playful design. Its body is vivid blue with bright yellow wheels and stylized lightning decals. The front has large, expressive eyes on the windshield and a friendly bumper.

per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-4uUQ5BOzt_s-unsplash: The object is parked on a dark forest road. Bare trees surround the car, and a thick fog envelops the background, creating an eerie atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-Gt8Uhr7osXE-unsplash: The object is positioned on the road's right side, facing away from the viewer. The misty background features bare trees and a winding road, with a red metal railing visible on the side.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-IlbtzPDX-U0-unsplash: The object is shown from a side view on a forest road. Fog and spindly trees in the background create a mysterious environment, emphasizing the dense woodland.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-hUFaXGSr_rk-unsplash: The object faces the camera, parked on a smooth, urban road. Buildings with modern design and vivid orange accents line the background under a clear sky.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-rdpMYDhm6RA-unsplash: The object is angled to show the rear in a wooded area. The foggy environment features dark trees lining the road and red railings, creating a misty forest setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-sUqYDz3iMqs-unsplash: The object is centered on a straight urban road, viewed from behind. The clean street and surrounding white buildings with orange trimming under the clear sky provide a modern city backdrop.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-spLGXlx4c2s-unsplash: The object is parked on an urban street, angled from the side. The bright white and orange exterior of the surrounding buildings gives a contemporary urban feel.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-urxxerI3DRI-unsplash: The object is centered and viewed from the back on a straight road. Modern industrial buildings with clean lines and orange patterns form the cityscape under a clear sky.

per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-4uUQ5BOzt_s-unsplash: The object is parked on a cartoon-style road within a Pixar-like forest setting. Stylized trees surround the car, and a soft, whimsical fog fills the background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-Gt8Uhr7osXE-unsplash: The object is positioned on a brightly colored road, in a Pixar-inspired environment. The cartoonish background features animated trees and a creatively winding road with a playful red railing.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-IlbtzPDX-U0-unsplash: The object is shown from a side view on an animated forest road. Soft, exaggerated fog and stylized trees create an enchanting Pixar atmosphere, enhancing the cartoon woodland.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-hUFaXGSr_rk-unsplash: The object faces the camera, parked on a vibrant, animated urban road. Cartoon buildings with bold orange accents and playful designs line the whimsical Pixar-inspired background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-rdpMYDhm6RA-unsplash: The object is angled to show the rear in a Pixar-themed forest area. The animated environment features stylized trees lining the road and cheerful red railings, creating a playful forest setting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-sUqYDz3iMqs-unsplash: The object is centered on a colorful urban road, viewed from behind. The cartoonish street and surrounding animated buildings with bold orange highlights under a bright sky embody a Pixar cityscape.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-spLGXlx4c2s-unsplash: The object is parked on a whimsical street, angled from the side. The bright animated exterior of the surrounding buildings offers a joyful and vibrant Pixar atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-urxxerI3DRI-unsplash: The object is centered and viewed from the back on a colorful road. Animated Pixar-style buildings with lively patterns form a playful cityscape under a bright sky.
